response.original_title: Unanswered: A Failed Call to Justice
response.overview: A follow-up to 2024's documentary 𝘚𝘢𝘧𝘦𝘳 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘈𝘭𝘭, 𝘜𝘯𝘢𝘯𝘴𝘸𝘦𝘳𝘦𝘥: 𝘈 𝘍𝘢𝘪𝘭𝘦𝘥 𝘊𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘵𝘰 𝘑𝘶𝘴𝘵𝘪𝘤𝘦 examines the June 29, 2024 shooting death of 28 year old Edmonton resident Mathios Arkangelo, as well as shares the Arkangelo family's fight for justice.  A moving and thought-provoking exploration of systemic oversight failures and the need for structural change in matters of police accountability.
response.title: Unanswered: A Failed Call to Justice
